project: UXO Detection Drone – Open‑Source Humanitarian Demining
mission: Low‑cost, open‑source, multi‑sensor UAV for landmine/UXO detection. Built solo on Android/Termux.
philosophy: Building is a trace. The rest is commentary.

large_metal_mines.scenario: 8 large mines (TMA, TMRP, mortars) – realistic Bosnia frontline
large_metal_mines.note: FN due to two mines <2 cells apart (spatial clustering)

plastic_mines.scenario: 8 plastic mines (PMA‑1/2/3, PROM‑1) – realistic Bosnia frontline
plastic_mines.note: First successful plastic mine detection! Accepts higher FP (13/ha) for life‑saving recall.

recommended_operational_settings.fusion_rule: Mag/HSI solo + (Therm | Vibro | GPR ≥2 agreement in 5‑cell window)

evolution_summary.to: v9.0 – Peak fusion, dual‑mode (metal/plastic) thresholds validated
key_breakthroughs: v4.0 – Peak detection + spatial voting replaces Bayesian fusion
v7.3 – Point‑target GPR model eliminates 837→6 false peaks
v8.1 – Realistic Bosnia large‑mine survey (66.7% precision)
v9.0 – Plastic mine sweep: 27‑combination threshold search finds GPR=0.2/Vibro=0.25/Thermal=0.6 gives 87.5% recall & 35% precision

next_steps: Field‑validate the plastic‑mine configuration (GPR=0.2) with a real NanoVNA over surrogate PMA‑2 targets
Build a combined metal+plastic realistic survey script to test the dual‑threshold recommendation
Write the final narrative report (Markdown) to accompany this knowledge graph
Release v1.0 of the open‑source detection software on GitHub
